title: Signal marked no_action
body: Manual escalation on branch_moqh369n with no configured asset, no escalation payload, and no identified catalyst. Bull's strongest point: broad macro backdrop shows record highs, strong earnings revisions, and rebounding bullish sentiment (Schwab 57%), which could support maintaining market exposure. Bear's strongest point: the law explicitly requires "repeated validation" of volume anomalies, and the volume evidence is contradictory (ADV down 10.49% in Nov 2025, plunging holiday volume, low-volume rally potentially masking dormant sellers) while bullish sentiment near highs is often a contrarian warning. Net read: the heartbeat package is thin and untargeted — without a specific instrument, price/volume anomaly, or repeated validation signal, there is no actionable basis. More investigation or a properly scoped escalation is needed before any trade-intent workflow is warranted.

thresholdPolicy.rationale: Confidence crossed the notify threshold but stayed below the trading threshold.
